evals.prompt: 帮我写一个Python脚本，用于批量启动Proxmox VE上的虚拟机。我有3个节点pve1、pve2、pve3，需要在每个节点上启动ID为100-105的VM。使用API Token认证。
evals.expected_output: A Python script that connects to PVE API and batch starts VMs 100-105 on nodes pve1, pve2, pve3
expectations: Script uses PVE API with token authentication
Script handles multiple nodes (pve1, pve2, pve3)
Script loops through VM IDs 100-105
Script includes error handling
Script uses POST /nodes/{node}/qemu/{vmid}/status/start endpoint

evals.prompt: 我需要创建一个PVE虚拟机模板管理工具，功能包括：1) 列出所有可用的LXC模板 2) 从Proxmox官方仓库下载指定模板 3) 基于模板创建新的LXC容器。请用Python实现。
evals.expected_output: A Python tool for managing LXC templates with list, download, and create container functions
expectations: Tool lists available LXC templates using /nodes/{node}/aplinfo
Tool downloads templates using /nodes/{node}/storage/{storage}/download-url or aplinfo
Tool creates LXC containers using POST /nodes/{node}/lxc
Tool includes configurable parameters (hostname, memory, disk, network)
Tool handles task polling for async operations

evals.prompt: 帮我配置一个使用cloud-init的Ubuntu虚拟机。需要在PVE上：1) 创建VM 2) 配置cloud-init参数（用户、SSH密钥、IP地址）3) 启动VM。请提供完整的代码示例。
evals.expected_output: Complete code example for creating and configuring a cloud-init enabled VM on PVE
expectations: Code creates VM with proper cloud-init setup (ide2 for config drive)
Code configures ciuser, cipassword or sshkeys
Code configures ipconfig0 with IP and gateway
Code uses Ubuntu cloud image or similar cloud-init ready image
Code starts VM after configuration

evals.prompt: 我需要监控PVE集群的状态，包括：1) 所有节点的CPU、内存、磁盘使用情况 2) 所有VM和容器的运行状态 3) 将结果输出为JSON格式。请写一个Python脚本。
evals.expected_output: A Python monitoring script that collects cluster resource usage and VM/container status
expectations: Script uses /cluster/resources to get all resources
Script uses /nodes/{node}/status for detailed node stats
Script collects CPU, memory, and disk usage
Script gets VM/container status (running/stopped)
Script outputs structured JSON with all metrics

evals.prompt: 帮我写一个PVE虚拟机快照管理脚本，功能包括：创建快照、列出所有快照、回滚到指定快照、删除快照。需要支持交互式选择VM和快照。
evals.expected_output: An interactive Python script for VM snapshot management
expectations: Script lists VMs for user selection
Script can create snapshots using POST /nodes/{node}/qemu/{vmid}/snapshot
Script lists snapshots using GET /nodes/{node}/qemu/{vmid}/snapshot
Script can rollback using POST /nodes/{node}/qemu/{vmid}/snapshot/{snapname}/rollback
Script can delete snapshots using DELETE endpoint
